title: Kavy YT Pack
description: A Resource Pack Created For Me/kavyy_lmaoo
body:
1. Makes Swords, Bows, Crossbows, Tridents, Shields, And Totems Smaller.
2. Makes Golden Apples, Golden Carrots, TNT, TNT Minecarts, Compass, Soul Fire Purple, And XP Bottles
3. Highlights Ores (Even Ancient Debris)
4. Purple Hearts, Server Icons, XP Bar, And Armor.
5. No Explosion Particle, Purple Sweeping Particle, Purple Critical Hit.
6. No Pumpkin Blur

This Pack Was Made For The Theme Of My MC Skin.. PURPLE
